privileged_info_for_vlm: The project directory is /home/ga/PycharmProjects/stego_toolkit. To pass the threshold (score >= 60), the agent must fix at least two of the three intentional bugs in lsb.py. The three bugs are: 1) destructive_masking (encoding uses bitwise AND with 0x00 instead of 0xFE), 2) wrong_base_conversion (decoding interprets binary string as base 10 instead of base 2), and 3) missing_terminator (decoder does not stop when reading '00000000').
